title: Suthi Suthi Vantheega Song Lyrics Padayappa
stanzas:
Suthi Suthi Vantheega Song Lyrics Padayappa
#ARRahman #SPB

Suthi suthi vandheenga
suttum vizhiyaal sutteega
ayyo en naanam aththu poga

kannaal yedhayo paatheega
kaayaa pazhamaa kaetteega
ennoda aavi iththu poga

Suthi suthi vandheenga
suttum vizhiyaal sutteega
muththaadum aasa
muththi poga

eththana ponnunga vanthaanga
enna iduppula soruga paathaaga
munthaanaiyil neengathaan
mudinjeega

pombala usuru
poga poga noaga
indhira maganae
indha tholla vazhga

adi kadhal thaerthalil
kattil chinnathil vettri petru
nee vazhga.

Suthi suthi vandheenga
suttum vizhiyaal sutteega
ayyo en naanam aththu poga

kannaal yedhayo paatheega
kaayaa pazhamaa kaetteega
ennoda aavi iththu poga

Suthi suthi vandheenga
suttum vizhiyaal sutteega
muththaadum aasa
muththi poga

en kadhu kadhu kadikkum
pallukku kaayam kodukkum
kaayam kodukkum
valavikku maarbu midhikkum
maarbu midhikkum
kaalukku muththam tharuven

en usura kudikkum
usura kudikkum udhattukku
manasu kedukkum
manasa kedukkum kannukku
kannam keeram
kannam keerum nagathukku
muththam iduven

adi thummum pozhudhilum
immi azhavilum piriyaadheega
umma thaeva theernthadhum
porvai pothiye urangaatheega

ini kan thoongalaam
kaiga thoongaathuga
oru thaaiyikku munnaal
thaalaatu vaikaatheega

Suthi suthi vandheenga
suttum vizhiyaal sutteega
muththaadum aasa
muththi poga

eththana ponnunga vanthaanga
enna iduppula soruga paathaaga
munthaanaiyil neengathaan
mudinjeega

pombala usuru
poga poga noaga
aambala kodukkum
anbu tholla vazhga

adi kadhal thaerthalil
kattil chinnathil vettri petru
nee vazhga.

naan thazhuvum podhu
thazhuvum podhu nazhuvuren
thayiru pola
thayiru pola uraiyiren
kayiru mela
kayira pottu
ayyo kadaiyureega

naan mayangi mayangi
mayangi mayangi kirangavum
mayakkam thelinji
mayakkam thelinji ezhumbavum
oththa poovil netthi pottil
ayyo adikkureega

uchci veyilula
kuchchi ice-a pol
urugaatheega

thanni panthale
thaagam edukkayil
eriyaatheega

ella thaandaatheega
enna thoondaatheega
en vaayodu vaai vaikka
vakkeelu vaikkaatheega

Suthi suthi vandheenga
suttum vizhiyaal sutteega
ayyo en naanam aththu poga

kannaal yedhayo paatheega
kaayaa pazhamaa kaetteega
ennoda aavi iththu poga

pombala usuru
poga poga noaga
aambala kodukkum
anbu tholla vazhga

adi kadhal thaerthalil
kattil chinnathil vettri petru
nee vazhga.

Suthi suthi vandheenga
suttum vizhiyaal sutteega
muththaadum aasa
muththi poga

eththana ponnunga vanthaanga
enna iduppula soruga paathaaga
munthaanaiyil neengathaan
mudinjeega

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

In which movie does this song appear?

Suthi Suthi Vantheega is featured in the movie Padayappa.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by renowned artists SP Balasubrahmanyam and Harini.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by the legendary A.R. Rahman.

When was this song released?

Suthi Suthi Vantheega was released on April 10, 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Suthi Suthi Vantheega, the characters express their deep emotional connection through heartfelt lyrics and melodious tunes. The song plays a pivotal role in Padayappa, highlighting themes of love and longing. With its enchanting composition by A.R. Rahman, it evokes nostalgia and warmth, making it a favorite among fans. The collaboration of SP Balasubrahmanyam and Harini adds a unique charm, ensuring the song's place in the hearts of listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Suthi Suthi Vantheega from Padayappa is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of SP Balasubrahmanyam and Harini, this song resonates with listeners, evoking deep emotions. A.R. Rahman's masterful composition adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for any romantic occasion.
stanzaMeanings: So many people have come, with their eyes shining, oh my pride is going away.
Look at me, whatever it is, my body is old, my spirit is leaving.
So many people have come, with their eyes shining, desires are fading away.
How many girls have come, what is this pain, you were the one who ended it all.
Women’s lives are going away, oh dear, let this path be blessed.
In love's trials, you have won, live well.
So many people have come, with their eyes shining, oh my pride is going away.
Look at me, whatever it is, my body is old, my spirit is leaving.
So many people have come, with their eyes shining, desires are fading away.
My heart will give to the one who is in need, I will give my love to the one who is in pain.
My life will drink the life of others, my heart will be open, my eyes will shine, I will give kisses to the one who is in pain.
Even in the moments of joy and sorrow, do not separate from me, your need has been fulfilled, do not sleep away from me.
Now we cannot sleep, do not let your hands rest, do not sing before a mother.
So many people have come, with their eyes shining, desires are fading away.
How many girls have come, what is this pain, you were the one who ended it all.
Women’s lives are going away, oh dear, let this path be blessed.
In love's trials, you have won, live well.
When I embrace, I embrace, I will speak like yogurt, I will tie my hands, oh my end is near.
I am fainting, fainting, fainting, I am confused, I will rise like a flower in the pot, oh my end is near.
In the bright sun, I will melt like ice.
Do not let the thirst of the water take away your fire.
Do not let everyone take away my voice, do not let my mouth be silenced.
So many people have come, with their eyes shining, oh my pride is going away.
Look at me, whatever it is, my body is old, my spirit is leaving.
Women’s lives are going away, oh dear, let this path be blessed.
In love's trials, you have won, live well.
So many people have come, with their eyes shining, desires are fading away.
